summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is incomplete and non-functional. Workflow references ./tests/Unit.Tests.ps1 (missing), ./fixtures/package.json (missing), ./config/license-config.json (missing) — workflow fails immediately on run. No test harness to run `act` or capture act-result.txt (required). No test fixtures. Actions not pinned to commit SHAs (checkout@v4 is version tag, not SHA; security issue). PowerShell scripts lack Set-StrictMode/-ErrorActionPreference Stop. JSON-to-hashtable conversion in Get-ComplianceReport (lines 49-50) is fragile and assumes specific structure. Actionlint validation not demonstrated. Workflow structure tests required but absent. Task requires "ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT" with act-result.txt artifact and exact output assertions — none of this infrastructure exists.
